 Final code:

 ```cpp
 #include <hexi/allocators/block_allocator.h>
 #include <cstdint>
 #include <vector>

 template<size_t element_count = 10>
 void demonstrate_block_allocator_behavior() {
     hexi::block_allocator<int, element_count> allocator{hexi::init_empty_t{}};
     std::vector<int*> allocated;

     // Allocate 5 integers
     for (size_t i = 0; i < 5; ++i) {
         allocated.push_back(allocator.allocate());
     }

     // Deallocate 3 of them
     for (size_t i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
         allocator.deallocate(allocated[i]);
     }

     // Remove the deallocated pointers from the vector
     allocated.erase(allocated.begin(), allocated.begin() + 3);

     // Allocate 2 more
     for (size_t i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {
         allocated.push_back(allocator.allocate());
     }

     // Deallocate the remaining 2
     for (auto ptr : allocated) {
         allocator.deallocate(ptr);
     }
 }
 ```

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;
    std::string sensor_name; // Added for extract_sensor_info

    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        // Write/Read sensor_id
        adaptor(sensor_id);

        // Handle temperatures vector
        if constexpr (std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<decltype(adaptor)>, hexi::stream_write_adaptor>) {
            // Serialization: write the size of the vector in native endianness
            uint32_t count = temperatures.size();
            adaptor(count);
            // Then write each temperature
            for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
                float converted = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
                adaptor(converted);
            }
            // Write pressure
            double converted_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor(converted_pressure);
        } else {
            // Deserialization: read the size of the vector in native endianness
            uint32_t count;
            adaptor(count);
            // Resize the vector and read each temperature
            temperatures.resize(count);
            for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
                adaptor(temp);
                hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
            }
            // Read pressure
            adaptor(pressure);
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
        }
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::stream<decltype(adaptor), hexi::allow_throw_t, std::endian::little> stream(adaptor);

    stream.serialise(data);

    return buffer;
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> vec_buffer(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(vec_buffer);
    hexi::stream<decltype(adaptor), hexi::allow_throw_t, std::endian::little> stream(adaptor);

    MeasurementData data;
    stream.deserialise(data);

    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::string_view sensor_name;
};

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> vec_buffer(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(vec_buffer);
    hexi::stream<decltype(adaptor), hexi::allow_throw_t, std::endian::little> stream(adaptor);

    SensorInfo info;
    info.sensor_name = stream.view();

    // Check if there's enough data for sensor_id
    stream.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t));

    uint32_t sensor_id;
    stream.get(&sensor_id, 1);

    // Skip the remaining data
    stream.skip(vec_buffer.size() - stream.total_read());

    info.sensor_id = sensor_id;

    return info;
}
